message.content:
Image 1: PASS. Dominant accent color: Blue (login button, "Mot de passe oublié?" link, and ESGIC logo blue elements are blue, not green).  
Image 2: PASS. Dominant accent color: Blue (stat card icons, active nav item "Tableau de bord", and other blue accents are blue; red used for "Dossiers Incomplets" stat card, orange for other elements).  
Image 3: PASS. Dominant accent color: Blue (status badges, buttons, and active elements are blue; red used for destructive/rejected items, orange for other elements).
